lines.speaker: Rufus
lines.text: Hello. A fine day for stealing, wouldn't you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose so, just as long as you're not planning to steal from me.

lines.speaker: Rufus
lines.text: You don't have any house keys, do you? You won't find yourself getting very far without any. Maybe come back later?

lines.speaker: Rufus
lines.text: You don't have any valuables worth my time. Come back when you do!

lines.speaker: Rufus
lines.text: Looks like [Caius/Lavinia/Victor] is returning to [his/her] house. You'll have to wait a moment until we get word of the next house.

lines.speaker: Rufus
lines.text: I hear that [Caius/Lavinia/Victor] might be leaving [his/her] house soon.

lines.speaker: Rufus
lines.text: Looks like [Caius/Lavinia/Victor] isn't home right now. Go quickly!

lines.speaker: Rufus
lines.text: Already forgotten? Head over to [Caius/Lavinia/Victor]'s house.

lines.speaker: Rufus
lines.text: Do you want me to point you in the right direction?

lines.speaker: Rufus
lines.text: His house is north of here.

lines.speaker: Rufus
lines.text: Her house is east of here.
